title: [Epic] Technical Debt & Security Remediation (v1.32.0)
body: Track and coordinate the implementation of the 7 core technical debt, architectural, and security issues identified during the codebase audit.

issues.title: [Debt] Resolve Goroutine Leak in Client Interceptor Health Checks
[Refactor] Implement HTTP Server Lifecycle Management in Gateway
[Refactor] Restrict SQLite Pool and Enable WAL Mode
[Security] Resolve Concurrent Write Race on Edge Control Websocket
[Security] Secure Subdomain Passcode Storage and Mask Audit Logs
[Debt] Thread-Safe Throttler Context Propagation
[Debt] Implement Dial Timeout for SMTP Client
